text:
is an artbook by Yoshiyuki Sadamoto published by KADOKAWA on 10 November 2026.

Overview

This limited edition is a massive 180-page volume in B4 size, beautifully packaged in a box https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gB5006201/ , and includes a reproduction of the original artwork and a mini print. (Reproduction print size: Approximately 310mm x 246mm). The pre-order started on 03 April 2026 and finished on 07 July 2026. https://www.eva-info.jp/26490
